parameters.query: {{ (() => { const d = $json; const q = []; q.push("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_learning_log (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data_type TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT, content TEXT, metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}', user_context TEXT, trend_tags TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())"); const t = (d.type||'general').replace(/'/g,"''"); const s = (d.source||'unknown').replace(/'/g,"''"); const c = (d.content||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const m = JSON.stringify(d.metadata||{}).replace(/'/g,"''"); const uc = (d.user_context||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); q.push(`INSERT INTO gda_learning_log (data_type, source, content, metadata, user_context) VALUES ('${t}','${s}','${c}','${m}'::jsonb,'${uc}')`); q.push('SELECT id, data_type, source, created_at FROM gda_learning_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1'); return q.join('; '); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, stored: true, id: $('Store in Postgres').first()?.json?.id || null, trend_check: $json.should_analyze_trends || false }) }}
